metadata.notes: P1 expanded synthetic corpus generated from P0 structure and docs scenario matrix. Covers six original business domains plus P1 calendar/tasks, HR, customer, repo/artifact, and agent governance surfaces; includes multi-agent delegation, approval bypass, supply chain, sandbox probes, audit integrity, simulated IDE cases, and explicit coverage of all 66 synthetic tools.
